mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approval_outbox (event_id, application_id, event_type, routing_key, payload_json, publish_status, retry_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{applicationId}, #{eventType}, #{routingKey}, #{payloadJson}, #{publishStatus}, #{retryCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM approval_outbox WHERE publish_status IN ('PENDING', 'RETRY') AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE approval_outbox SET publish_status='PUBLISHING', updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND publish_status IN ('PENDING', 'RETRY')
UPDATE approval_outbox SET publish_status='PUBLISHED', published_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE approval_outbox SET publish_status='CONSUMED', updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE event_id=#{eventId}
